Looking at the anchor summaries:
- DOC2_A6 mentions "Current assets include 819,182,542.14 yuan in cash and 140,521,968.68 yuan in trading financial assets"

This seems to directly contain the value for "交易性金融资产" for Mike Biotech. Let me open this anchor to get the exact verbatim text.

|应付票据|22,444,386.40|80,472,270.00|-72.11%|主要系报告期内采用票据结算供应商货款到期承兑所致。|

--- Round 3 ---
<think>I've now collected the key information from DOC2 (迈克生物股份有限公司):

1. From DOC2_A6 (Consolidated Balance Sheet):
- 交易性金融资产 | 140,521,968.68 | 311,144,527.59

2. From DOC2_A2 (Non-recurring Gains and Losses / Financial Statement Changes):
- 交易性金融资产 | 140,521,968.68 | 311,144,527.59 | -54.84% | 主要系报告期内根据募投项目资金需求赎回银行理财产品所致。

So for 迈克生物股份有限公司 (Mike Biotech), the "交易性金融资产" value as of March 31, 2024 is 140,521,968.68 yuan.

The question asks which company has the HIGHEST "交易性金融资产". I'm only processing DOC2 right now. I have the value for this company (迈克生物), but I don't have values for DOC1 or DOC3 yet.

Since I'm only supposed to process ONE document at a time, and my role is evidence extraction (not final filtering), I should extract the verbatim evidence from this document and stop. The Composer will handle cross-document comparison.

Let me extract the relevant verbatim spans:

From DOC2_A6:
"交易性金融资产|140,521,968.68|311,144,527.59"

From DOC2_A2:
"交易性金融资产|140,521,968.68|311,144,527.59|-54.84%|主要系报告期内根据募投项目资金需求赎回银行理财产品所致。"

I should also note the company name from the document. 

From DOC2_A6: "编制单位：迈克生物股份有限公司"

I have sufficient evidence from this document. I should stop and provide the answer.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"已收集到迈克生物股份有限公司的交易性金融资产数据，该公司2024年3月31日交易性金融资产期末余额为140,521,968.68元。作为单个文档的证据提取，已完成该文档相关信息的提取。"}</search>
<answer>["编制单位：迈克生物股份有限公司", "交易性金融资产|140,521,968.68|311,144,527.59"]</answer>
